emails.subject: RE: GEA Rainey
emails.body: GEA Rainey is located in OK. There are no emission trading programs in OK.

emails.subject: RE: GEA Rainey
emails.body: RE: GEA Rainey Mike, I need you and John to go over the bplan and preso today. Thanks. Trevor Woods

emails.subject: RE: GEA Rainey
emails.body: I go over the b-plan everyday of my life. I will try to get John to go through 50+ pages and the preso. To: Taylor, Michael E

emails.subject: RE: GEA Rainey
emails.body: Don't try Mike T, get it done. Trevor Woods To: Taylor, Michael E

emails.subject: RE: GEA Rainey
emails.body: He is looking at it right now. Oh, by the way, we had a group meeting this morning with George. To: Taylor, Michael E

emails.subject: RE: GEA Rainey
emails.body: And what did george have to say? Trevor Woods To: Taylor, Michael E

emails.subject: RE: GEA Rainey
emails.body: A few things. Mainly next week this floor will not be in high spirits. The layoffs will be next week. EGM and EIM will be hit hard John asked about bonuses (also, mentioned he had 3 job offers). George said should have an idea within a few weeks etc. To: Taylor, Michael E

emails.subject: RE: GEA Rainey
emails.body: Makes sense. I'm sure he does. I've got 3 my self and there is a larger need for experienced coal traders. What groups will be hit hardest and did he provide any specifics about our group? Trevor Woods To: Taylor, Michael E

emails.subject: RE: GEA Rainey
emails.body: Not much said about our group, except he has a direct line to Walley and has spoken with Dynegy. He feels like they are excited to get us and that they mentioned "that they are good at being number 2." He also mentioned a few companies have asked if the coal group was for sale as a whole. He listened but told them no thanks. Sounds like a few small changes in our group but nothing drastic. George did say we have working capital (we didn't for 2 days). Not sure if that means coal or coal and emissions. Didn't specify what groups will be hit the hardest, he only said EGM and EIM. Oh, by the way my job offers are pouring as well. To many to count!!!!! It is hard to do work with all the head hunters calling him every hour. Oh wait, just kidding! To: Taylor, Michael E
